content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.stream_manager
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/stream_manager.py (1025 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Stream Manager - RTMPS streaming to Twitter/X and other platforms
Handles video encoding, audio mixing, and stream output

CLASSES:
- StreamPlatform(Enum): Supported streaming platforms
- StreamQuality(Enum): Stream quality presets
- StreamConfig: Configuration for stream output
  Methods: def for_twitter(cls, stream_key: str, rtmp_url: str=None, quality: StreamQuality=StreamQuality.MEDIU
  Methods: def for_youtube(cls, stream_key: str, quality: StreamQuality=StreamQuality.HIGH) -> 'StreamConfig'
  Methods: def for_twitch(cls, stream_key: str, server: str='live.twitch.tv') -> 'StreamConfig'
  Methods: def full_rtmp_url(self) -> str
  Methods: def for_twitter_hls(cls, hls_output_dir: str=None, hls_base_url: str=None) -> 'StreamConfig'
  Methods: def hls_playlist_url(self) -> str
- StreamStats: Real-time streaming statistics
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- StreamManager: Manages RTMPS/RTMP streaming to Twitter and other platforms

Features:
- FFmpeg-
  Methods: async def start(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: async def send_frame(self, frame: np.ndarray)
  Methods: async def send_audio(self, audio: np.ndarray)
  Methods: async def queue_audio_file(self, audio_file: str)
  Methods: def save_audio_to_file(self, audio: np.ndarray, sample_rate: int=44100) -> str
  Methods: def on_error(self, callback: Callable[[str], None])
  Methods: def on_stats_update(self, callback: Callable[[StreamStats], None])
- OverlayRenderer: Renders overlays on top of avatar frames

Supports:
- Chat messages
- Alerts
- S
  Methods: def add_chat_message(self, username: str, message: str, color: Tuple[int, int, int]=(255, 255, 255))
  Methods: def add_alert(self, text: str, alert_type: str='info')
  Methods: def set_status(self, text: str)
  Methods: def set_branding(self, image: np.ndarray)
  Methods: def render(self, frame: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray
